page: Microsoft Azure D32as_v4 is a general-purpose virtual machine belonging to the DASv4 family. It is powered by an AMD EPYC 7763 processor utilizing the x86_64 architecture. The server features 32 dedicated vCPUs mapped from 16 physical cores with multithreading enabled running at a clock speed of 3.525 GHz. It is equipped with 128.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core, and includes 262 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability.

Benchmark data indicates strong single-core performance, with stress-ng single-core CPU tests placing in the top 25% at 2707.6. Memory performance is also robust, highlighted by a strong PassMark memory score of 2895.83. Multi-core performance, static web serving throughput, and Redis SET operations fall within the average range. For machine learning workloads, the server achieves top-tier performance in text generation for small LLM models at 330.2 tokens per second, though it shows weaker performance when processing prompts for large 70B models.

From a resource density perspective, the D32as_v4 offers a balanced allocation of compute and memory resources, making it a qualitatively cost-efficient option for workloads that do not require specialized GPU acceleration. The combination of dedicated AMD EPYC cores, Premium Storage compatibility, and balanced memory makes this server well-suited for general-purpose applications, database operations, web serving, and software compilation.
description: The Microsoft Azure D32as_v4 is a general-purpose virtual machine from the DASv4 family, powered by a dedicated AMD EPYC 7763 processor. Operating on the x86_64 architecture, it features 32 vCPUs, 128.0 GB of RAM, and 262 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability. The server exhibits strong single-core CPU performance and memory scores in benchmarks, alongside top-tier text generation speeds for small language models. Its multi-core compute, web serving throughput, and database operations perform at an average level. Lacking a GPU, it is not designed for heavy graphics or large-scale AI training. This instance is best suited for balanced workloads such as database management, software compilation, web serving, and general-purpose enterprise applications.
og_description: Microsoft Azure D32as_v4 is a general-purpose virtual machine featuring 32 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 128 GB of RAM, and 262 GB of local storage, delivering balanced compute and memory performance.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure D32as_v4 is a general-purpose VM with 32 AMD EPYC vCPUs, 128 GB RAM, and 262 GB local storage, optimized for balanced workloads.
tagline: A balanced general-purpose virtual machine featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processors, premium storage capabilities, and robust single-core performance.
bullet_points: Powered by a dedicated AMD EPYC 7763 processor with 32 vCPUs and 128 GB RAM
Includes 262 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability
Strong single-core CPU and memory benchmark performance
Top-tier text generation speeds for small-scale LLM inference
Suitable for database operations, web serving, and software compilation
